narrative_summary: - User requested creation of a new Dagster project named `acme_co_dataeng`
- Read the `create-dagster` reference doc to confirm correct scaffolding approach
- Ran `uvx create-dagster project acme_co_dataeng --uv-sync` to scaffold the project with venv and dependencies
- Project was created in a temp directory with Python 3.11.13, Dagster 1.12.19, and a full `.venv`
- Provided instructions for activating the venv and starting the Dagster UI with `uv run dg dev`
